title: SSE Wire Format Envelope
description: Server-Sent Events wire format as sent over HTTP by the Backstage SSE controller (GET /pipelines/:trackId/events). Defines the SSE frame structure including the id field for Last-Event-ID replay, event type, JSON-serialized data, and retry directive.

id.description: SSE event ID. Set as the 'id' field in the SSE frame. The browser stores this and sends it back as Last-Event-ID on reconnection, enabling replay of missed events.

event.description: SSE event type. Maps to the 'event' field in the SSE frame. The frontend EventSource listener filters on this value.

data.description: JSON-serialized PipelineEventPayload (see sse-message.schema.json). The SSE spec transmits data as a string; the client must JSON.parse it.

retry.description: Reconnection time in milliseconds. Sent once at the start of the stream to configure the browser's automatic reconnection interval.
